accurate.why: Claims match the bill text; high-level description of all titles and key provisions is accurate.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; coverage of the bill's programs and restrictions is consistent with the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies this as FY2025 appropriations for energy and water development agencies.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes amendments to CALFED, drought relief, WIIN Act, Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act, and Natural Gas Act.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes numerous restrictions on fund use, including CRT, COVID mandates, Chinese-controlled entities.

effective_dates.why: Notes FY2025 period through September 30, 2025 and various 'remain available until expended' provisions.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all four titles and major provisions at an appropriate level of detail.

objective_tone.why: Neutral and descriptive; policy riders listed factually.

concise.why: Very lengthy, listing nearly every program and provision; could be condensed considerably.

correct_entities.why: Army Corps, Bureau of Reclamation, DOE, FERC, NRC all correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: No specific dollar amounts cited that could be checked for errors; appropriately omits most figures.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
